_snapshot: SyncView Samples — Upsert (23jv00ihCX75TjaB), LIVE active version captured 2026-06-15 immediately before adding the Supabase dual-write mirror. activeVersionId cd7026c0-e4a3-48f9-8c77-7061ffdbbed2. n8n's own version history is the authoritative rollback; this is a convenience reference.
name: SyncView Samples — Upsert
description: POST /webhook/samples-upsert. Body {client, sample}. Upserts a row into Samples_<slug> by id with a phantom-row guard and a 3-way tombstone-aware merge on the comments column. Persists approval (Kasper→Client) fields. Archives via status=Archived.

parameters.jsCode:
const j = ($input.first() && $input.first().json) || {};
return [{ json: { ok: true, sample: j } }];
